source: NewsWell block kinds — newswell-studio/app/types/pageTemplate.ts TemplateBlockKind = 'ad'|'editorial'|'filler'|'what-inside'|'wild-art' (also pageSchema-issue.ts .kind). Structure per EJ: top level is Editorial / Ad / Filler, and an Editorial block is an Article, Wild Art, or What's Inside. `kind` = the repo enum value each maps to. Edit freely; the app + renderer read this file.

types.label: Article
types.desc: Standard editorial article — headline, body, art

types.label: Wild Art
types.desc: Standalone photo / art with caption, no article
